description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named msys2-64bit in the build stage, running on the saas-windows-medium-amd64 tag. The job uses a before_script that writes a timestamp, creates a cache directory, downloads msys2.exe.sig, checks for a cached installer signature and file, fetches the latest installer if needed, runs msys2.exe installer, patches pacman-key post‑install script, disables CheckSpace in pacman.conf, performs two pacman -Syuu updates, and kills lingering msys-2.0.dll processes. The script installs mingw packages via pacman, sets environment variables (JOBS, CHERE_INVOKING, MSYS, CCACHE_BASEDIR, CCACHE_DIR, CCACHE_MAXSIZE, CCACHE_DEPEND, CC), creates a build directory, runs ccache --zero‑stats, configures with $CONFIGURE_ARGS, builds with make -j$JOBS, runs make check with MTESTARGS='$TEST_ARGS' (showing meson‑logs/testlog.txt on failure), displays ccache stats, and outputs a finish timestamp. Cache key $CI_JOB_NAME stores msys64/var/cache and ccache and is kept always. Artifacts expire in 7 days, are named $CI_JOB_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG, and include build/meson-logs/testlog.txt and a JUnit report at build/meson-logs/testlog.junit.xml, with variables CONFIGURE_ARGS, FF_SCRIPT_SECTIONS, GIT_FETCH_EXTRA_FLAGS, and MSYSTEM defined.
